title: Concept Registry
description: Canonical declaration of all math concepts the product covers. Maps Utah Core Standards to concept entries with mastery rules, lesson references, and granularity declarations. Sourced from the specs in /specs/shared/adaptive-scaffolding.md and /specs/shared/micro-lessons.md.

version.description: Schema/data version. Bump on breaking changes.

lastUpdated.description: ISO date the registry was last edited.

concepts.description: All concept entries in the registry.

id.description: Unique concept ID. Usually matches the Utah Core standard code (e.g., 'K.CC.4a'). Sub-letters allowed (a, b, c) for split standards.

standardCode.description: The canonical Utah Core Standard code this concept maps to. Often identical to id, but split concepts share the parent code (e.g., K.CC.4a, K.CC.4b, K.CC.4c all map to standardCode='K.CC.4').

description.description: Human-readable description of the concept. Often the standard's text or a kid-friendly paraphrase.

strand.description: Utah strand: Counting & Cardinality, Operations & Algebraic Thinking, Number & Operations in Base Ten, Measurement & Data, Geometry.

requiresLesson.description: If true, a MicroLesson plays on first encounter. If false, the concept is exercises-only or is implicitly covered by another concept's lesson.

lessonId.description: The primary lesson's id (matches a lesson file in /specs/lessons/). Must be present iff requiresLesson is true.

secondaryLessonIds.description: Optional. Additional lesson IDs that fire in later sessions for the same concept (e.g., a follow-up lesson covering vocabulary the primary lesson didn't introduce). Order is firing order across subsequent sessions.

introducedBy.description: The activity slug that is the canonical introducer. Present iff requiresLesson is true. Null for exercises-only concepts.

granularity.description: Mastery granularity per adaptive-scaffolding.md. Default is concept-wide; per-instance is opt-in for concepts with many discrete sub-elements (numerals, basic facts, etc.).

instanceKeys.description: Enumerated set of instance keys, present iff granularity = per-instance. Each key gets an independent ConceptState.

exercisesOnlyMastery.description: Coverage-based mastery rule, present iff this concept is exercises-only (requiresLesson=false AND no introducedBy).

exercisedBy.description: Optional. Activity slugs that exercise this concept (regardless of who introduces). Informational; the runtime can also infer this from activity specs.

notes.description: Free-text designer notes. Not consumed by runtime.

demonstrationModes.description: Distinct modes of demonstrating the concept. Activities emit telemetry events naming a mode when the kid uses that mode.

minModesDemonstrated.description: Number of distinct modes the kid must demonstrate to satisfy the coverage path.

minSessions.description: Distinct sessions across which the demonstrations must occur.

fallbackPracticeCount.description: If the kid logs this many successes in concept-exercising activities, mastery fires regardless of mode coverage.

siblingCreditRules.description: Optional. When another concept reaches a specified mastery state, automatically credit one of this concept's demonstrationModes. Useful for ensuring meta-concepts (e.g., K.OA.1) remain reachable for kids who succeed at sibling concepts via narrow input paths.

grantedMode.description: Must be one of this concept's demonstrationModes.
